judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual element: a black-and-white photograph of a man in a suit, tie, and glasses, but Description B adds additional details about the newspaper clipping context, caption text, and annotations that Description A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: UPI Telephoto, black-and-white photograph of an older man with glasses and graying hair, wearing a suit jacket, tie, and white shirt. He is seated at a desk, looking down at papers. The image is cropped to a head-and-shoulders portrait.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned newspaper page with multiple columns of text about UFO sightings and one small black-and-white portrait photograph labeled “DR. CONDON” with the caption “Saucer-watcher.”*
